title: FIRRTL memories of depth 1 are not index correctly

features.name: memory declaration with depth of 1
features.description: Code should include a memory declaration with depth equal to 1, which requires a 1-bit address field to represent index 0

features.name: memory address assignment with 1-bit literal
features.description: Code should include a memory address assignment using a 1-bit literal value to address a depth-1 memory
